creator: uqs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hey Ali,
foolishly I bought a new T490, thinking that FreeBSD works well on Thinkpads. Oh well ...

So wireless doesn't work, but there's an open PR for that. acpi_ibm(4) does not attach, so I don't have any of the usual events, snd_hda is wonky, too. But one thing at a time.

This is on 12.0-RELEASE, what sort of debugging should I try or where are PCI IDs required to have acpi_ibm attach for this model?
